cdsiSource: Hib Start at 2/7/12/15-month series; PRP-OMP 3-dose; Risk series

cases.description: Standard 4-dose: D1 at 2mo, D2 at 4mo, D3 at 6mo, D4 booster at 12-15mo
cases.rationale: CDSI Start-at-2mo D1 minAge=42d. Code line 133 fires am>=2.
CDSI PRP-OMP series has 3 doses (D1 6w, D2 10w, D3 12mo). Code line 129 sets hibPrim=2 for PedvaxHIB and only fires hib<hibPrim. With hib=2 already, no D3 at 6mo — correct (D3 is the 12mo booster).
CDSI 'Start at 12 months 2-dose' series for catch-up start ≥12mo. Code line 149-153 emits 1-dose catch-up at 16-59mo.

cases.description: HSCT: 3-dose reset post-transplant regardless of prior
cases.rationale: CDSI Risk 3-dose series: minAgeToStart=42d, 3 doses. Code line 159-163 implements HSCT 3-dose reset.
